title: Trico
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Trico''' was a [[Plant/Legends|plant]] native to the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Yavin 8/Legends|Yavin 8]]. It was used by the native [[Sentience/Legends|sapient]] [[Melodie]]s as a form of food. Trico was made into a paste and fed to infant Melodies until they were old enough to eat the silver-backed [[Fish/Legends|fish]] that inhabited the ponds of the purple [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]] of the moon, where the Melodies lived.

==Appearances==
*''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Lyric's World]]''
